evidence.observed: The API notice requires a followed attribution link to each Remote OK listing and prohibits unapproved logo use.
The published terms repeat the API and site attribution requirement.
The wildcard robots policy allows ordinary public paths with a one-second crawl delay, restricts query paths, and reserves model-training use; named AI crawler groups also exclude profile paths.

local_policy.operation: public API GET job-list checks only
local_policy.basis: JobSentinel ceiling stays below the reviewed one-second crawl-delay boundary.
